headlines.title: Supreme Court faces new criticism for redistricting decision so close to 2026 elections
headlines.description: The Supreme Court has admonished judges not to interfere in election cases when the process is underway, but it is being accused of doing that in redistricting decisions.

headlines.title: Nebraska secretary of state loses GOP primary to challenger questioning election security
headlines.description: Omaha businessman Scott Petersen on Tuesday defeated Nebraska Secretary of State Bob Evnen in a Republican primary election, toppling a two-term incumbent by raising questions on the campaign trail about election integrity and ballot security

headlines.title: Miami residents sue to stop Trump’s library from taking waterfront plot
headlines.description: The lawsuit alleges that Florida officials violated the Constitution when granting President Donald Trump the valuable real estate.

headlines.title: Trump arrives in China for high-stakes summit
headlines.description: President Trump arrived in Beijing for a critical summit where he said he will push for China's leader to "open up" China to American businesses. NBC Nightly News anchor Tom Llamas reports.

headlines.title: Inside China’s push for more marriages and children
headlines.description: The one child policy has left a lasting impact on Chinese society, where marriage and birth rates are both very low. That’s why the Chinese government is now instituting programs to encourage people to have children and get married. NBC News’ Janis Mackey Frayer has the story.

headlines.title: Former Republican running for governor as Democrat because Trump is ‘not for Georgia’
headlines.description: Fmr. Republican Lt. Gov. Geoff Duncan, now running as a Democrat candidate for Georgia governor, joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss potential redistricting in his state and how Democrats can win statewide in 2026.

headlines.title: The cage match is on for tickets to Trump’s UFC fight at the White House
headlines.description: 4,000-plus spectators who are lucky enough, cunning enough or rich enough will score a seat to the UFC fight on the South Lawn next month.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Redistricting raises the stakes in battles for statehouse control: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: In today’s edition, Adam Edelman dives into the next stage of the redistricting fight for Democrats as they look to make up ground on Republicans.

headlines.title: Vance announces suspension of $1.3 billion in Medicaid payments to California
headlines.description: Vice President JD Vance said the Trump administration is withholding $1.3 billion in Medicaid payments to California and is threatening to suspend federal funding to all states if they don’t aggressively prosecute fraud in their Medicaid programs.

headlines.title: Democrats turn to state legislative races to catch up in the redistricting battle
headlines.description: After a series of court rulings gave Republicans a decisive advantage in the national redistricting fight, Democrats’ options for a counterpunch before this year’s midterms are limited.

headlines.title: A third of Congressional Black Caucus could be wiped out by redistricting, Democrats warn
headlines.description: The Congressional Black Caucus is expected to dramatically lose membership because of the Supreme Court’s redistricting ruling.
